name: Jetpack Race Arena
description: Blast off with Jetpack Race ArenaRush! Fly bullet-powered jetpacks, ride crazy vehicles, and surf the wave-rider through thrilling arenas. Dodge lasers, zappers, and guided missiles while collecting coins and making millions of dollars. Complete daring missions to boost your rank, equip high-tech gadgets and power-ups, and storm arenas in giant mechs. Customise your look with stylish outfits, earn achievements, and battle friends in endless high-flying action. Test your reflexes with simple one-touch controls and enjoy new free game modes in special events!
instructions: Swipe to move along the rope Tap amp hold for speed boost
